title: neottopteris antrophyoides
intro: Neottopteris antrophyoides, also known as the tropical fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neottopteris antrophyoides include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a topical application to treat skin conditions and wounds.
